what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that links attachment att-b2975786 in the dragnet-development channel to board item bb66a021 as a board_items attachment type, storing only metadata (id, channel, attachment_type, target, added timestamp).
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-bb66a021.
It records an ISO-8601 added timestamp.
No code symbols or explanatory text are present.
standouts: It is a pure cross-reference stub between channel memory and a board item.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme.
It captures only linkage metadata with no payload.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
Target is expressed as a board:// URI.
File is file-local and neutral, with no ranking or evaluative language.
concerns: No descriptive content explains why the board item is attached.
The board item's title or content is not included, so the link is opaque in isolation.
No author or versioning metadata is present.
notes: A channel-memory attachment stub that records a dragnet-development board_items link to board item bb66a021, with no explanatory body.
questions: What is the content or title of board item bb66a021?

intention_signals: It appears to record that a board item was attached or referenced from a channel memory entry, preserving the typed link and timestamp so the channel context can later be associated with the board item.

summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-b2975786 in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, targeting board item bb66a021 and recording an added timestamp.
